name: Bikini Alert
short_description: In the distant future, after a brutal war with machines and AI, humanity is forced to retreat underground. The Supply Collector Team is kidnapped, and the future of mankind rests on one man: Cyne Rizerous.
detailed_description:
Bikini Alert is a fast-paced run-and-gun action game where you must survive against relentless waves of robotic enemies responsible for driving humanity underground. No one knows exactly who created these machines or what their true purpose is, but with resources running out, humanity has no choice but to fight back!

Enter Cyne Rizerous, a fearless young man who has never seen the open sky. Determined to save the last Supply Collector Team, he takes up arms and joins the battle. At his command is Leviatan, a powerful vehicle that can instantly transform into a heavily armed combat mech. But as he fights for survival, his curiosity may uncover a long-buried truth about humanity’s past...

Key Features:

  • Post-apocalyptic environments – Explore a devastated world overrun by machines.

  • Bullet hell action – Dodge waves of enemy fire in intense battles.

  • Epic boss fights – Face off against massive bosses and challenging minibosses.

  • Mission selection – Replay unlocked levels to train and improve your skills.

  • Random power-ups – Discover spread shots, mini-drones, shields, armor restoration, and the devastating laser flamethrower.

  • Unlockable collectibles – Find bobblehead decorations, Leviatan skins, and unique explosion effects.

  • Gallery mode – Unlock stunning game illustrations after boss fights.

Disclaimer:

"Bikini Alert" refers to an official UK Ministry of Defense alert used for unspecified threats. While the game plays on this term with a double meaning, it is not a mature-rated game.

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Spanish - Spain
*languages with full audio support
